project_type: Go static binary for Linux early-boot init (PID 1) and CLI
build_system: Make + GoReleaser. CGO_ENABLED=0 static build. Linux-only targets (amd64/arm64).
test_framework: go test with testify/assert+require. Tests co-located as *_test.go. Linux-only tests use //go:build linux tag.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'go build ./...' to confirm compilation. 2. Run 'go test -race -covermode=atomic -failfast ./...' for full test suite. 3. Run 'golangci-lint run ./...' for linting.
setup_instructions: Go 1.25.1 and golangci-lint 2.1.6 are pre-installed. No additional setup needed.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Go 1.25.1 available. golangci-lint 2.1.6 available. No Docker daemon expected for unit tests (e2e uses Docker). Linux-only code guarded by //go:build linux.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. TDD workflow (RED-GREEN-REFACTOR). 80%+ coverage. golangci-lint for formatting (gofumpt) and linting. Feature branches: feature/<task-id>-<short-slug>. Small interfaces, dependency injection, functional options pattern.
key_patterns: 1. Interface-based OS abstraction (internal/iface). 2. Package-level vars for testability of hardcoded paths. 3. slog.SetDefault with TextHandler for structured logging. 4. slog.LevelVar for dynamic level changes without handler replacement. 5. //go:build linux on all OS-specific code. 6. reexec multi-personality binary pattern.
directory_structure: internal/enterchroot/ - chroot/pivot-root for boot sequence. internal/boot/ - init orchestrator (bootstrap, modes, finalize). internal/iface/ - OS boundary interfaces. main.go - entry point with reexec handlers.
